title: Welcome to the Boilerplate Feed
body: This is the first entry in your local JSON-backed feed. Content is bundled with the app and local state (likes, bookmarks, read status) persists across launches.

title: Sticker Tier System Upgraded
body: The sticker unlock system now supports zoom-range conditions, allowing individual stickers to define a min and max latitude delta window for visibility.

title: Debug Size Warnings for Sticker Assets
body: In debug builds the app now logs a warning when a sticker asset size does not match the recommended size for its tier. This helps catch artwork issues early.

title: CartoDB Tile Layer Layering Fix
body: Map overlays (polylines) were previously rendered below the CartoDB tile layer and were only visible while tiles were loading. The z-order has been corrected so polylines always appear on top.

title: Glass UI Buttons Added to Map Shell
body: The AppShellView now includes glass-effect buttons for notifications, friends, and tray actions, floating above the map in the bottom bar.
